item.name: Create sales invoices from delivery notes

request.description:
Create sales invoice from delivery note.

in the body put

``` json
{
"deliveryNoteIds": [4],
"aggregateOn":"Customer"
}

```

in deliveryNoteIds put the delivery note id

on "aggregateOn" put the customer for whom you want to aggregate the delivery note into the same invoice.

don't put aggregateOn if you don't want to aggregate the ddt in the same invoice

item.name: Creating the match between customer invoice and payment

request.description:
Create the match between the invoice and the corresponding payment.

1. to do this retrieve the paymentManagementDocumentId from the GET on invoices
    

EndFragment

[https://rest.reviso.com/v2/invoices/drafts](https://rest.reviso.com/v2/invoices/drafts)

2\. Then to run the GET on payment management filtering by paymentManagementDocumentId and retrieve the rate ID of the invoice  
[https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents/](https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents/)

3\. To run the GET on vouchers by filtering by customer payment and retrieve the rate ID of the voucher

StartFragment

https://rest.reviso.com/vouchers/?filter=voucherType$eq:customerpayment

EndFragment

4. Then to run the GET on payment management filtering by voucherID of the payment and retrieve the rateID of the payment

[https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents?filter=voucher.id$eq:<](https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents?filter=voucher.id$eq:203)id>

5\. To run the **PUT**

**PUT**

[https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents/paymentManagementDocumentId/rates//matches](https://rest.reviso.com/payment-management/documents/paymentManagementDocumentId/rates//matches)

``` json
[ 
 {   
     "matchedAmount":120.00,
     "matchedAmountInBaseCurrency":120.00,
     "targetPaymentRate":
     {                         
         "id": 53247068,
         "currency": "EUR"                 
     }  
 } 
]

```

where the target is rate id of the payment
